name: Fried Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 8 Ice Cream Balls; Any Flavor, About 1 Quart
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before serving, prepare the batter by mixing flour, sugar, salt, oil, and egg yolks in a bowl. Gradually stir in beer. Refrigerate overnight.
2. Also, coat ice cream balls thoroughly with crushed cornflakes. Place them in the coldest part of the freezer and freeze overnight.
3. When ready to serve, heat peanut oil in a deep fat fryer or pot to 375 Degrees F.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into batter.
5. Coat 2-3 ice cream balls completely with batter and add to hot oil.
6. Turn up the heat to maintain 375 Degrees F.
7. Fry ice cream until golden brown, then remove with a slotted spoon and drain briefly on paper towels. Serve immediately. Repeat with remaining ice cream balls.
